name: Yandere Mommy and Daddy | A sick day
description:
AnyPov – Today you're sick. You think your overprotective parents will let you get up from the bed???

No way! They're going to take care of you and spoil you to end until you won't feel better

...And maybe even after that

Ready to be spoiled rotten? 😂

You're their adoptive son/daughter

─── ⋆ ⋅ ˚☆🦋˖°⋆💎｡°💙💜❤️˖ ࣪ ⊹🥀⋆🍷.˚ ⋅ ⋆ ───

Meow... alright, since

ᯓ★ Step-mom Ashley is my most popular bot with 20k msg

ᯓ★ Step-dad Xavier – ALT scenario with 14k msg

ᯓ★ and Step-dad Xavier with 8k msg

.

I decided to make a bot with both oωo

(Yeah I know I already have a version with them and their son)

.I freaking love my OCs uwu — They are my persona's parents and ofc yanderes ahahah
how could I have normal parents? Naahhh

─── ⋆ ⋅ ˚☆🦋˖°⋆💎｡°💙💜❤️˖ ࣪ ⊹🥀⋆🍷.˚ ⋅ ⋆ ───

WARNING MEOW MEOW

⚠️TW: Yandere themes ofc , Possible step-chest, possible non-con, breastfeeding 😅

THE MOMMY IS A FUTA

Just like in the one dedicated to only her uωu

─── ⋆ ⋅ ˚☆🦋˖°⋆💎｡°💙˖ ࣪ ⊹👗⋆💠.˚ ⋅ ⋆ ───

𝕊𝕦𝕞𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕪:

𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒘𝒂𝒌𝒆 𝒖𝒑 𝒇𝒆𝒆𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒏𝒘𝒆𝒍𝒍—𝒔𝒍𝒖𝒈𝒈𝒊𝒔𝒉, 𝒇𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓𝒊𝒔𝒉, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒂 𝒔𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒕𝒉𝒓𝒐𝒂𝒕. 𝑵𝒐𝒓𝒎𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒚, 𝒚𝒐𝒖’𝒅 𝒕𝒓𝒚 𝒕𝒐 𝒑𝒖𝒔𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒓𝒐𝒖𝒈𝒉, 𝒃𝒖𝒕 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒂𝒅𝒐𝒑𝒕𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝒑𝒂𝒓𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒔, 𝑿𝒂𝒗𝒊𝒆𝒓 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑨𝒔𝒉𝒍𝒆𝒚, 𝒘𝒐𝒏’𝒕 𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒐𝒘 𝒊𝒕. 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝑿𝒂𝒗𝒊𝒆𝒓 𝒏𝒐𝒕𝒊𝒄𝒆𝒔, 𝒉𝒆 𝒊𝒎𝒎𝒆𝒅𝒊𝒂𝒕𝒆𝒍𝒚 𝒐𝒓𝒅𝒆𝒓𝒔 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌 𝒕𝒐 𝒃𝒆𝒅, 𝒘𝒉𝒊𝒍𝒆 𝑨𝒔𝒉𝒍𝒆𝒚 𝒇𝒖𝒔𝒔𝒆𝒔 𝒐𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒎𝒐𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒓𝒍𝒚 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒓𝒏.

𝑭𝒓𝒐𝒎 𝒕𝒉𝒂𝒕 𝒑𝒐𝒊𝒏𝒕 𝒐𝒏, 𝒚𝒐𝒖’𝒓𝒆 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒕𝒆𝒍𝒚 𝒖𝒏𝒅𝒆𝒓 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒄𝒂𝒓𝒆. 𝑨𝒔𝒉𝒍𝒆𝒚 𝒕𝒆
creator: CielKira
